title: Sita Ramam
desc: An orphaned soldier's life changes after he receives a letter from a girl named Sita. He meets her and love blossoms between them. When he returns to her camp in Kashmir, he sends a letter to Sita that will not reach her.

title: Sita Ramam
desc: Upon returning to Pakistan, Afreen sets off to fulfil her grandfather's wish of delivering a letter from Ram to Sita. Along the way, she finds Ram and learns about their love story.

title: Kali Kitaab
desc: When narratives from a cryptic book spring to life, a woman experiences bizarre phenomena and resolves to uncover the identity of its enigmatic writer.

title: Kali Kitaab
desc: When narratives from a cryptic book spring to life, a woman experiences bizarre phenomena and resolves to uncover the identity of its enigmatic writer.

title: Vijay Raghavan
desc: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his neighbourhood. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Vijay Raghavan
desc: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his locality. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Chhaava
desc: Shivaji's death sparks the Maratha-Mughal conflict. His son Sambhaji leads resistance against Aurangzeb's forces. Amid battles and intrigue, both sides face challenges in a struggle for power.

title: Ragada
desc: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Ragada
desc: This is the story of Satya who joins a gang and then questions this decision.

title: Shershaah
desc: Vikram Batra, a young man, dreams of becoming a soldier and falls in love with Dimple. Soon after his training, he climbs the military ranks and contributes to India's victory in the Kargil war.

title: Shershaah
desc: The life of Indian army captain Vikram Batra, awarded with the Param Vir Chakra, India's highest award for valour for his actions during the 1999 Kargil War.

title: Son Of Devil
desc: When a man rescues a woman from several thugs, who are harassing her, she falls in love with him. However, she is unaware of his dark past and deep secrets.
